title: Albany County flood-threat bridge assessment
disclaimer: This is a fictional, deterministic hackathon demonstration. It is not live emergency information and does not authorize operational action.

assessment_request.field_report: Heavy rainfall is expected. Floodwater and debris are accumulating near the supports, and scour is visible at the foundation.

reasons: Flood forecast and river-rise inputs are increasing.
The simulated bridge has an aging, low-condition structure with observed scour.
Emergency access and alternative routes are not confirmed.
recommended_actions: Request an urgent qualified engineer assessment.
Stage emergency resources and monitor water levels.
